_comment: Per-network on-chain config, keyed by CHAIN_ID. Components read CHAIN_ID from the environment, then load this file via src/shared/network_config.py — never hardcode a contract address, RPC URL, or explorer link in source. Secrets (ALCHEMY_API_KEY, private keys) stay in .env and are substituted into rpc_url_template at load time; nothing in this file is a secret.

8453.label: Base
8453._role_comment: Only network valid for submission evidence (Basescan tx #1-3, easscan attestation).

84532.label: Base Sepolia
84532._role_comment: Permitted only for isolated component tests that support it (e.g. EAS). AgentFightClub has no Base Sepolia deployment — never select this network for AFC calls. Never valid for submission evidence.
